# meshstack_api_key (Resource)

Manages a meshStack API key.

~> **Preview:** This resource is in preview. Breaking changes are possible without prior notice due to changes in the underlying [meshStack preview API](https://docs.meshcloud.io/api/technical-specifications#preview-endpoints) or due to changes in this provider. Please ensure you are running the latest version of the provider and report any bugs via [GitHub issues](https://github.com/meshcloud/terraform-provider-meshstack/issues) or via support@meshcloud.io.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "meshstack_api_key" "example" {
  metadata = {
    owned_by_workspace = data.meshstack_workspace.example.metadata.name
  }

  spec = {
    display_name = "ci-key"
    permissions  = ["LANDINGZONE_LIST", "PROJECT_LIST"]
    # expires_at is optional; if omitted the key never expires.
    # Setting an expiry is recommended for security best practices.
    # expires_at = "2025-12-31"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `metadata` (Attributes) API key metadata. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--metadata))
- `spec` (Attributes) API key specification. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec))

### Read-Only

- `status` (Attributes) API key status. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--status))

<a id="nestedatt--metadata"></a>
### Nested Schema for `metadata`

Required:

- `owned_by_workspace` (String) Identifier of the workspace that owns the API key.

Read-Only:

- `uuid` (String) UUID of the API key (server-generated).


<a id="nestedatt--spec"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spec`

Required:

- `display_name` (String) Display name of the API key.
- `permissions` (Set of String) Permissions assigned to the API key. See [API Permissions](https://docs.meshcloud.io/api/authentication/api-permissions/) for detailed documentation. Each permission exists as a workspace-scoped variant, an admin-scoped (`ADM_`-prefixed) variant, or both. `ADM_`-prefixed permissions grant access across all workspaces. `MANAGED_`-prefixed permissions grant cross-workspace access scoped to resources managed by the API key's workspace (e.g. building block definitions, landing zones, or platforms it owns).
  - `APIKEY_DELETE`/`APIKEY_LIST`/`APIKEY_SAVE` and `ADM_APIKEY_DELETE`/`ADM_APIKEY_LIST`/`ADM_APIKEY_SAVE`
  - `BUILDINGBLOCK_DELETE`/`BUILDINGBLOCK_LIST`/`BUILDINGBLOCK_SAVE` and `MANAGED_BUILDINGBLOCK_LIST`/`MANAGED_BUILDINGBLOCK_SAVE` and `ADM_BUILDINGBLOCK_DELETE`/`ADM_BUILDINGBLOCK_LIST`/`ADM_BUILDINGBLOCK_SAVE`
  - `BUILDINGBLOCKDEFINITION_DELETE`/`BUILDINGBLOCKDEFINITION_LIST`/`BUILDINGBLOCKDEFINITION_SAVE` and `ADM_BUILDINGBLOCKDEFINITION_DELETE`/`ADM_BUILDINGBLOCKDEFINITION_LIST`/`ADM_BUILDINGBLOCKDEFINITION_SAVE`/`ADM_REVIEW_PUBLICATION`
  - `MANAGED_BUILDINGBLOCKRUN_LIST`/`MANAGED_BUILDINGBLOCKRUN_SAVE`/`MANAGED_BUILDINGBLOCKRUNSOURCE_SAVE` and `ADM_BUILDINGBLOCKRUN_LIST`/`ADM_BUILDINGBLOCKRUN_SAVE`/`ADM_BUILDINGBLOCKRUNSOURCE_SAVE`
  - `BUILDINGBLOCKRUNNER_DELETE`/`BUILDINGBLOCKRUNNER_LIST`/`BUILDINGBLOCKRUNNER_SAVE` and `ADM_BUILDINGBLOCKRUNNER_DELETE`/`ADM_BUILDINGBLOCKRUNNER_LIST`/`ADM_BUILDINGBLOCKRUNNER_SAVE`
  - `COMMUNICATIONDEFINITION_DELETE`/`COMMUNICATIONDEFINITION_LIST`/`COMMUNICATIONDEFINITION_SAVE` and `ADM_COMMUNICATIONDEFINITION_DELETE`/`ADM_COMMUNICATIONDEFINITION_LIST`/`ADM_COMMUNICATIONDEFINITION_SAVE`
  - `COMMUNICATION_DELETE`/`COMMUNICATION_LIST`/`COMMUNICATION_SAVE` and `ADM_COMMUNICATION_DELETE`/`ADM_COMMUNICATION_LIST`/`ADM_COMMUNICATION_SAVE`
  - `EVENTLOG_LIST` and `ADM_EVENTLOG_LIST`
  - `INTEGRATION_DELETE`/`INTEGRATION_LIST`/`INTEGRATION_SAVE` and `ADM_INTEGRATION_DELETE`/`ADM_INTEGRATION_LIST`/`ADM_INTEGRATION_SAVE`
  - `LANDINGZONE_DELETE`/`LANDINGZONE_LIST`/`LANDINGZONE_SAVE` and `ADM_LANDINGZONE_DELETE`/`ADM_LANDINGZONE_LIST`/`ADM_LANDINGZONE_SAVE`
  - `PAYMENTMETHOD_LIST` and `ADM_PAYMENTMETHOD_DELETE`/`ADM_PAYMENTMETHOD_LIST`/`ADM_PAYMENTMETHOD_SAVE`
  - `PLATFORMINSTANCE_DELETE`/`PLATFORMINSTANCE_LIST`/`PLATFORMINSTANCE_SAVE` and `ADM_PLATFORMINSTANCE_DELETE`/`ADM_PLATFORMINSTANCE_LIST`/`ADM_PLATFORMINSTANCE_SAVE`
  - `PROJECTPRINCIPALROLE_DELETE`/`PROJECTPRINCIPALROLE_LIST`/`PROJECTPRINCIPALROLE_SAVE` and `ADM_PROJECTPRINCIPALROLE_DELETE`/`ADM_PROJECTPRINCIPALROLE_LIST`/`ADM_PROJECTPRINCIPALROLE_SAVE`
  - `ADM_PROJECTROLE_DELETE`/`ADM_PROJECTROLE_SAVE`
  - `PROJECT_DELETE`/`PROJECT_LIST`/`PROJECT_SAVE` and `ADM_PROJECT_DELETE`/`ADM_PROJECT_LIST`/`ADM_PROJECT_SAVE`
  - `SERVICEINSTANCE_DELETE`/`SERVICEINSTANCE_LIST`/`SERVICEINSTANCE_SAVE` and `ADM_SERVICEINSTANCE_DELETE`/`ADM_SERVICEINSTANCE_LIST`/`ADM_SERVICEINSTANCE_SAVE`
  - `ADM_TAGDEFINITION_DELETE`/`ADM_TAGDEFINITION_LIST`/`ADM_TAGDEFINITION_SAVE`
  - `TENANT_DELETE`/`TENANT_LIST`/`TENANT_SAVE` and `MANAGED_TENANT_IMPORT` and `ADM_TENANT_DELETE`/`ADM_TENANT_IMPORT`/`ADM_TENANT_LIST`/`ADM_TENANT_SAVE`
  - `TFSTATE_DELETE`/`TFSTATE_LIST`/`TFSTATE_SAVE` and `MANAGED_TFSTATE_DELETE`/`MANAGED_TFSTATE_LIST`/`MANAGED_TFSTATE_SAVE` and `ADM_TFSTATE_DELETE`/`ADM_TFSTATE_LIST`/`ADM_TFSTATE_SAVE`
  - `ADM_USER_DELETE`/`ADM_USER_LIST`/`ADM_USER_SAVE`
  - `WORKSPACEPRINCIPALBINDING_DELETE`/`WORKSPACEPRINCIPALBINDING_LIST`/`WORKSPACEPRINCIPALBINDING_SAVE` and `ADM_WORKSPACEPRINCIPALBINDING_DELETE`/`ADM_WORKSPACEPRINCIPALBINDING_LIST`/`ADM_WORKSPACEPRINCIPALBINDING_SAVE`
  - `WORKSPACEUSERGROUP_LIST` and `ADM_WORKSPACEUSERGROUP_LIST`
  - `WORKSPACE_DELETE`/`WORKSPACE_LIST`/`WORKSPACE_SAVE` and `ADM_WORKSPACE_DELETE`/`ADM_WORKSPACE_LIST`/`ADM_WORKSPACE_SAVE`

Optional:

- `expires_at` (String) Expiry date of the API key (ISO date, e.g. `2025-12-31`). If omitted, the key never expires. Setting an expiry is recommended for security best practices. Changing this rotates the secret and a new client_secret is returned.


<a id="nestedatt--status"></a>
### Nested Schema for `status`

Read-Only:

- `client_id` (String) The client ID used for authentication.
- `client_secret` (String, Sensitive) The client secret for authentication. Stored in state after creation and rotated when `expires_at` changes. The API only returns this value on create and on secret rotation.
